description: Large fragmentary list of ca. 70 men; possibly people who are unable to pay the capitation tax. Many individuals are mentioned together with their brothers and sons. One individual is listed together with his workmen. Names include Mufaḍḍal b. Hillel, Mufaḍḍal al-Naqūsh, Saʿīd b. Shemuel and his son, Manṣūr b. Hiba, Muḥāssan al-Tabāk, Būnṣar Ibn al-Ḥūsh, Sūlīm b. Yosef, [..]m b. Sanīṭ, Yaʿaqov al-Maghribī and Surūr al-Khurasānī. (Information from CUDL; see also Goitein's index card.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
